name: PR-quality eval gate dry-run computes the metrics but does not write quality-eval.json to disk
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && for i in $(seq 1 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":4}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && [ ! -f pr-corpus/quality-eval.json ] && grep -q 'gate=pass' out.txt && grep -q 'dry_run=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
